rationale: Educ. Code §29.316 governs language acquisition assessments for deaf or hard of hearing children. It has no operative connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption levels or school district revenue.
quote: In this section, "language acquisition" includes expressive and receptive language acquisition and literacy development in English, American Sign Language, or both
_note: No conflict. §29.316 is substantively unrelated to homestead exemption appraisal values. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not implicate any operative provision of this section.
